'''âng-p-dh''' ('''kangapadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xform|xform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xform|xform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-p-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kangapadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingapadh|thingapadh]] || [[word:jingapadh|jingapadh]] || [[word:shingapadh|shingapadh]] || [[word:kingapadh|kingapadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungapadh|thuthungapadh]] || [[word:jujungapadh|jujungapadh]] || [[word:shushungapadh|shushungapadh]] || [[word:kukungapadh|kukungapadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungapadh|thungapadh]] || [[word:jungapadh|jungapadh]] || [[word:shungapadh|shungapadh]] || [[word:kungapadh|kungapadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungapadh|thungapadh]] || [[word:jungapadh|jungapadh]] || [[word:shungapadh|shungapadh]] || [[word:kungapadh|kungapadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengapadh|thengapadh]] || [[word:jengapadh|jengapadh]] || [[word:shengapadh|shengapadh]] || [[word:kengapadh|kengapadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongapadh|thothongapadh]] || [[word:jojongapadh|jojongapadh]] || [[word:shoshongapadh|shoshongapadh]] || [[word:kokongapadh|kokongapadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongapadh|thongapadh]] || [[word:jongapadh|jongapadh]] || [[word:shongapadh|shongapadh]] || [[word:kongapadh|kongapadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongapadh|thongapadh]] || [[word:jongapadh|jongapadh]] || [[word:shongapadh|shongapadh]] || [[word:kongapadh|kongapadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngapadh|thĂŠngapadh]] || [[word:jĂŠngapadh|jĂŠngapadh]] || [[word:shĂŠngapadh|shĂŠngapadh]] || [[word:kĂŠngapadh|kĂŠngapadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangapadh|thathangapadh]] || [[word:jajangapadh|jajangapadh]] || [[word:shashangapadh|shashangapadh]] || [[word:kakangapadh|kakangapadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangapadh|thangapadh]] || [[word:jangapadh|jangapadh]] || [[word:shangapadh|shangapadh]] || [[word:kangapadh|kangapadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangapadh|thangapadh]] || [[word:jangapadh|jangapadh]] || [[word:shangapadh|shangapadh]] || [[word:kangapadh|kangapadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangapadh|shangapadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangapadh|goshangapadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangapadh|gokishangapadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangapadhnĂŒ|shangapadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangapadhnknĂŒ|goshangapadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapadhnĂŒ|gokishangapadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangapadhshĂ«|shangapadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkshĂ«|goshangapadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangapadhshĂ«|gokishangapadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapadhro|shangapadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkro|goshangapadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapadhro|gokishangapadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapadhmu|shangapadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkmu|goshangapadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapadhmu|gokishangapadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangapadhsher|shangapadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangapadhnksher|goshangapadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangapadhsher|gokishangapadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangapadhng|shangapadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkng|goshangapadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangapadhng|gokishangapadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangapadhya|shangapadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkya|goshangapadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangapadhya|gokishangapadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangapadhyam|shangapadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkyam|goshangapadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangapadhyam|gokishangapadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangapadhnĂŒshĂ«|shangapadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangapadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangapadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangapadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangapadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapadhnĂŒro|shangapadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapadhnknĂŒro|goshangapadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapadhnĂŒro|gokishangapadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapadhnĂŒmu|shangapadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapadhnknĂŒmu|goshangapadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapadhnĂŒmu|gokishangapadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangapadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shangapadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangapadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangapadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapadhshĂ«ro|shangapadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkshĂ«ro|goshangapadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapadhshĂ«ro|gokishangapadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapadhshĂ«mu|shangapadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkshĂ«mu|goshangapadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapadhshĂ«mu|gokishangapadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangapadhronĂŒ|shangapadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkronĂŒ|goshangapadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapadhronĂŒ|gokishangapadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangapadhroshĂ«|shangapadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkroshĂ«|goshangapadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangapadhroshĂ«|gokishangapadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangapadhromu|shangapadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkromu|goshangapadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangapadhromu|gokishangapadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangapadhmunĂŒ|shangapadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkmunĂŒ|goshangapadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangapadhmunĂŒ|gokishangapadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangapadhmushĂ«|shangapadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkmushĂ«|goshangapadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangapadhmushĂ«|gokishangapadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangapadhmuro|shangapadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangapadhnkmuro|goshangapadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangapadhmuro|gokishangapadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
